prompt_text:
### Demographics: 37-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Recurrent UTIs over the last 6 months with dysuria/frequency.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.6 kg; Height 179.4 cm; BMI 24.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 283mg/dL; 9 months ago 280mg/dL; 6 months ago 303mg/dL; 3 months ago 317mg/dL; current 242mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.1kg; 9 months ago 78.3kg; 6 months ago 77.2kg; 3 months ago 75.7kg; current 77.6kg), Height (12 months ago 179.4cm; 9 months ago 179.4cm; 6 months ago 179.4cm; 3 months ago 179.4cm; current 179.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 134mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 46mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; current 42mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 108mg/g; 9 months ago 119mg/g; 6 months ago 123mg/g; 3 months ago 127mg/g; current 125mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 101mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 154mg/dL; 6 months ago 152mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
